mapper.select: SELECT tbc.id, tbc.blog_id AS blogId, tbc.user_id AS userId, tbc.content, tbc.parent_id AS parentId, tbc.reply_to_user_id AS replyToUserId, tbc.like_count AS likeCount, tbc.create_time AS createTime, tbc.address, tu.nick_name AS userName, tu.icon AS userAvatar FROM tb_blog_comment tbc INNER JOIN tb_user tu ON tu.id = tbc.user_id WHERE tbc.blog_id = #{blogId}
